args.query: site:help.target.com order pickup cancel order ready for pickup refund Target

content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: Can I cancel my Drive Up or Order Pickup order?

  - url: https://www.target.com/help/article/000062035

  - source: Target

  - domain: target.com


  ## Content


  Drive Up and Order Pickup orders have several cancellation methods.


  Customers can open the order details page and cancel items from the order. In the
  Target app, order details are available from Purchase history under the My Target
  tab. On Target.com, customers can open Orders from the account name menu.


  A customer may also contact Target.com Guest Services at 1-800-591-3869, ask for
  cancellation at the Guest Services desk in the pickup store, or leave the order
  uncollected until its pickup window expires.


  Target sends an email containing the cancellation details after the order is canceled.


  The separate order-hold guidance explains how long a store keeps Drive Up and Order
  Pickup orders before an uncollected order is canceled.

  '
metadata: {}
title: Can I cancel my Drive Up or Order Pickup order?
url: https://www.target.com/help/article/000062035

content: "# Web Document

## Metadata

- title: How long will a store hold my\
  \ Drive Up or Order Pickup order?
- url: https://www.target.com/help/article/000062599
\
  - source: Target
- domain: target.com

## Content

Most Drive Up and Order\
  \ Pickup orders are held for three days. When an order is not collected during that\
  \ period, Target cancels it and refunds the original form of payment.

Orders\
  \ containing fresh or frozen grocery items use a shorter window. Those orders are\
  \ held until the close of the next business day before cancellation and refund.
\
  
Starbucks Caf\xE9 items added to a Drive Up order can only be kept for 30 minutes\
  \ after the order is placed. After that period, temperature-sensitive items must\
  \ be discarded.

For orders without fresh or frozen groceries, the pickup window\
  \ can be extended by an additional three days from the Order details page. The extension\
  \ must be requested before the initial pickup window ends. Orders containing fresh\
  \ or frozen groceries cannot be extended.
"
metadata: {}
title: How long will a store hold my Drive Up or Order Pickup order?
url: https://www.target.com/help/article/000062599

content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: Edit or cancel order

  - url: https://www.target.com/help/articles/orders-purchases/edit-or-cancel-your-order

  - source: Target

  - domain: target.com


  ## Content


  Cancellation availability for shipped Target.com orders depends on the processing
  status of the item.


  In the Target app, customers can select an order from Purchases, open the order
  details, choose Cancel items, select the item and a cancellation reason, and submit
  the cancellation. The cancellation option appears only for items that have not begun
  processing for shipping.


  On Target.com, customers sign in, open the order, locate the item, and select Request
  cancellation. The request option is likewise limited to items that have not begun
  shipping processing. The customer then chooses a reason and submits the request.


  After a cancellation request, Target emails the cancellation status. A canceled
  item is not charged, although a temporary card authorization hold may remain until
  the bank releases it.


  If the shipping cancellation window has passed, the customer may refuse delivery
  or return the item to a Target store or by mail under the applicable return process.

  '
metadata: {}
title: Edit or cancel order
url: https://www.target.com/help/articles/orders-purchases/edit-or-cancel-your-order

Yes. **ORD-TGT-1301 is still eligible to be canceled**: it’s ready for pickup, the pickup window is active, and it hasn’t been picked up.

If you cancel it:

- The **Ceramic Table Lamp** order will be canceled.
- Target will **refund the $34.99 to your original credit card**.
- Target will send an email with the cancellation details.
- You can cancel from the order details page in the Target app or on Target.com. Target also says you can request cancellation through Guest Services.
- Alternatively, since this is a standard pickup order with no fresh/frozen groceries, you can leave it uncollected; Target generally cancels and refunds pickup orders after the **three-day hold period**.

final_answer:
Yes. **ORD-TGT-1301 is still eligible to be canceled**: it’s ready for pickup, the pickup window is active, and it hasn’t been picked up.

If you cancel it:

- The **Ceramic Table Lamp** order will be canceled.
- Target will **refund the $34.99 to your original credit card**.
- Target will send an email with the cancellation details.
- You can cancel from the order details page in the Target app or on Target.com. Target also says you can request cancellation through Guest Services.
- Alternatively, since this is a standard pickup order with no fresh/frozen groceries, you can leave it uncollected; Target generally cancels and refunds pickup orders after the **three-day hold period**.
